description:
This event bundle contains 50 items commemorating players and organizations participating in the FACEIT 2018 London CS:GO Major Championship:
 ● One sticker for each of the 24 participating teams.
 ● One graffiti for each of the 24 participating teams.
 ● One FACEIT sticker.
 ● One FACEIT graffiti.
   (Does not include autographs and holo/foil capsules.)

50% of the proceeds from the sale of this event bundle support the included players and organizations.
name: London 2018 Mega Bundle
